stemHtml:
During dispatch calculations, you want to calculate the maximum possible Traffic Load and carry as a minimum 13 800 kg of Block Fuel.

Given the following information, what is the Allowed Traffic Load for your flight?

Maximum Take-off Mass: 71 204 kg
Maximum Zero Fuel Mass: 56 490 kg
Dry Operating Mass: 40 195 kg
Actual Traffic Load: 14 585 kg
Taxi Fuel: 215 kg

Assume NO restrictions on the Landing Mass.
